violations.description: Person in charge. — --Certified food service manager had an expired certificate or is no longer associated with this establishment. Documentation available during inspection shows certified food manager’s certificate expired in March. Facility must have a certified food manager.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Opened gallon of 2% milk was found expired in the small refrigerator next to ice dispenser. Expired foods should not be used in licensed kitchens.

Handwashing lavatory supplies. — --Handwash lavatory was not supplied with supply of individual disposable towels, continuous towel supply system, or heated air-drying device. Paper towel dispenser was found empty during inspection. Paper towels should be available at all times.
Number, location, accessibility, soap and paper towels provided (3 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
